title: heliophila elata subsp. elata
intro: Heliophila elata subsp. elata, also known as the tall heliophila or tall African heliophila, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Heliophila elata subsp. elata include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
